free_text: The natural samples of pure metals (Pd, Cd, Sn, Te,
Nd) and BaO, (Ce-2)0-3, (Sm-2)-O-3 oxydes were used.
Isomer yield and ratio measurement using the
g-quanta energy spectrum lines data. The integral
cross sections were obtained using the measured
isomeric ratios and published total photoneutron
photoneutron reaction cross section - the sum of the
cross section for ground and isomer states - data.
The cross sections of (g,n) reactions were measured
for ground and isomeric states 1h-11/2 in 16 isotopes
of Pd, Cd, Sn, Te, Ba, Ce, Nd, and Sm. The energy of
g-rays was placed in the region of the giant dipole
resonance. An activation method of measurement has
been used. The cross section dependence on the
neutron and proton number in nucleus was obtained and
on the excitation energy of the residual nucleus as
well. Different factors influencing the values of the
REFERENCE and DATES corrected at MSU CDFE,
